name: Tin Lizzie's Sports Bar
about: Tin Lizzie's Sports Bar is a modern venue offering golf simulator experiences alongside a full-service bar and food menu. Located in downtown historic Casey, Iowa, it operates with a unique speakeasy vibe and is an extension of Pioneers Pub & Grub. The facility features high-tech Full Swing golf simulators and is designed for both casual play and serious practice, catering to individuals and groups looking for a relaxed entertainment option. Reservations are highly recommended, and the venue can accommodate up to six people per simulator bay, making it suitable for both small groups and larger parties.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Full Swing simulator system with dual-tracking technology for precise swing data
One of only two locations in Iowa offering this premium simulator technology
Ability to play on 84 championship golf courses in a relaxed, social bar environment

food_and_drink.notes: Fully functioning kitchen with a small plates menu

simulator_hardware.notes: Patented dual-tracking technology with high-speed cameras and infrared light wave

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are required to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue offers a full bar and a small plates kitchen menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes roughly one hour per person to complete 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state if the venue is kid-friendly, so it is recommended to contact them directly for specific policies regarding children.
